goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'thursday' and should 'arrive by 18:30'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'stansted airport'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'nandos city centre'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on thursday and should arrive by 18:30
The train should depart from cambridge and should go to stansted airport
Make sure you get train ID and travel time
You are also looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called nandos city centre
